itinerary.title: Luxury France Tour
itinerary.tagline: Paris • Versailles • French Riviera (Nice/Monaco) • Provence Lavender Fields
itinerary.overview:
06 Nights / 07 Days Ultra-Luxury French Elegance Showcase SERIAL CODE: FR-003 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-FRA-LUX-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: France CATEGORY: Luxury France Tour Package DURATION: 06 Nights / 07 Days Paris (3N) • French Riviera (3N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the height of sophistication and style with this TRAGUIN curated luxury French expedition. From the iconic streets of Paris to the shimmering azure coast of the French Riviera, experience an unmatched journey of culture, gastronomy, and breathtaking beauty. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 06 Nights / 07 Days France package (FR-003 / TRG-FRA-LUX-2026): Paris • Versailles • French Riviera (Nice/Monaco) • Provence Lavender Fields.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN PARIS & SEINE CRUISE

days.title: ARRIVAL IN PARIS & SEINE CRUISE
days.description: Arrive in elegant Paris. Private transfer to your ultra-luxury hotel. Enjoy a private Seine River cruise with champagne at sunset.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PARIS ART & GASTRONOMY
days.description: Exclusive private tour of the Louvre followed by a gourmet French cooking class in a historic Parisian kitchen.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PALACE OF VERSAILLES & SHOPPING
days.description: Private excursion to Versailles. Afternoon dedicated to high-end shopping in the legendary boutiques of the Golden Triangle.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLY TO FRENCH RIVIERA
days.description: Private flight to Nice. Check into a world-class seaside resort. Enjoy the vibrant colors and lifestyle of the French Riviera.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MONACO & MONTE CARLO
days.description: Day trip to Monaco and Monte Carlo. Explore the prince's palace and the famous casino, enjoying the exclusive experiences of the elite coast.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: PROVENCE LAVENDER & CÔTE D'AZUR
days.description: Visit the lavender fields of Provence followed by a coastal drive along the stunning Côte d'Azur. A premium French experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast. Private transfer to Nice airport for departure, completing your premium France experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

hotels.name: Four Seasons George V / similar
hotels.description: OPTION 01 – ULTRA LUXURY: Four Seasons George V

inclusions.text: 06 Nights in handpicked premium hotels across Paris • Versailles • French Riviera (Nice/Monaco) • Provence Lavender Fields
Private executive chauffeur-driven luxury ground transfers throughout
Private guided Paris sightseeing including Eiffel Tower, Louvre, and Versailles
French Riviera and Monaco elite coastal experiences
Curated wine country and heritage castle experiences
International airfare and France/Schengen entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
